jsonBody.query: query($from: String, $to: String) { transcripts(limit: 50, fromDate: $from, toDate: $to) { id title date duration summary { short_summary action_items keywords } participants } }

parameters.jsCode:
const d = $input.first().json;
const prompt = `You are the Growisto Sales-Marketing AI Brain's auto-digest engine. 

Today: ${d.dateLabel}
Meetings processed: ${d.totalMeetings}

MEETING DATA:
${d.meetingContext}

Generate a daily journal markdown file. Return ONLY the markdown, no preamble.

REQUIRED FORMAT:
---
title: Daily Journal – ${d.dateLabel}
type: log
tags: [journal, auto-digest]
updated: ${d.dateLabel}
owner: auto
---

# Daily Journal – ${d.dateLabel}

> Auto-generated from Fireflies digest. ${d.totalMeetings} meeting(s) processed.

## Key updates by workstream

[For EACH category found in the meeting data, write a concise section with decisions, shipped items, and in-progress work. Max 4 bullet points per section.]

## Action items by owner

| Owner | Action Item | Source | Priority |
|---|---|---|---|
[Extract ALL action items. Assign: high (urgent/blockers), mid (this week), low (backlog).]

## Blockers and decisions pending

[Explicitly blocked items or decisions awaiting input. If none: "None flagged."]

## Carry-forwards

[Items deferred or marked ongoing. If none: "None."]

RULES:
- Extract action items from ALL meeting categories
- For AI Progress meetings, extract ONLY sales and marketing relevant items
- Be concise and actionable
- Never invent information not in the meeting data`;

return [{ json: { prompt, branchName: d.branchName, filePath: d.filePath, dateLabel: d.dateLabel, totalMeetings: d.totalMeetings } }];

arguments.pr_body: ={{ "Automated Fireflies digest for " + $json.dateLabel + ". " + $json.totalMeetings + " meeting(s). Covers AI scrum, Amazon nurture, sales & marketing, AI progress. Review and merge." }}

jsonBody.text: ={{ "📋 *Daily Brain Digest – " + $json.dateLabel + "* — " + $json.totalMeetings + " meeting(s) processed. PR open for review → https://github.com/nishantpandey-growisto/sales-mktg-ai-plan/pulls" }}
={{ "ℹ️ Daily Brain Digest – " + $json.dateLabel + ": No relevant meetings found in the past 24h. No PR created." }}
